home.tagline: High-performance, minimalist P2P tracking engine. Search through our indexed database of verified torrents.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search torrents by name, tag or infohash…

ledger.name: Name
ledger.empty: No releases indexed yet — be the first to seed.

swarmTile.hottestEmpty: Activity will appear here as soon as someone starts seeding.

highPerf.title: High Performance
highPerf.description: Built with Node.js and Redis for sub-millisecond response times and high concurrency support.

multiProtocol.title: Multi-Protocol
multiProtocol.description: Supports HTTP, UDP, and WebSocket protocols for maximum compatibility with all BitTorrent clients.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully transparent and community-driven. Designed for privacy and efficiency in the P2P ecosystem.

login.title: Sign in
login.registrationsClosed: Registrations are currently closed. Only existing members can sign in.
login.registrationsInviteOnly: Registrations are by invitation only. You'll need a code from an existing member to create an account.
login.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, a recovery code, or use a passkey.

errors.invalidCode: That code didn't match. Try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again later.

register.title: Create an account
register.closedDescription: New registrations are currently not accepted. If you have an invite, please contact an administrator.
register.firstAccountNotice: This is the first account. It will have administrator privileges.
register.zkeDescription: Your password is never sent to the server. If you forget it, your account cannot be recovered.
register.passwordHint: Minimum 12 characters. Stronger is better — your password never leaves the browser.
register.panicPasswordHint: A second password used to encrypt sensitive data on demand. Cannot be recovered if forgotten.
register.panicPasswordWarning: The panic password enables emergency database encryption. Store it securely — it cannot be recovered or changed.

errors.weakPassword: That password is too short or too predictable.
errors.invalidInvite: That invitation code is invalid or expired.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.panicPasswordTooShort: Panic password must be at least 12 characters

stats.activeSeeds: {n} active seed · {invites} invite | {n} active seeds · {invites} invites

bonus.title: Bonus reserve
bonus.caption: Earned by seeding active swarms — rare torrents and long-haul archives pay more thanks to the operator's tier curves.

history.title: Transaction ledger
history.empty: No transactions yet — start seeding to fill the page.

credentials.title: Tracker credentials
credentials.warning: Never share this. Rotating it will break any torrent client still configured with the old announce URL.
credentials.useInClient: Use this in your torrent client. Includes your passkey.
credentials.rotateConfirmMessage: Your current announce URL will stop working immediately. Any torrent client still pointed at the old passkey will need to be reconfigured with the new one.
credentials.rotateSuccess: Passkey rotated — copy the new one into your torrent client.

activity.title: Activity
activity.noUploads: You haven't published any releases yet.

seedEmpty.pending: No seeds currently building up time.
seedEmpty.completed: You haven't met any seed obligations yet.
seedEmpty.active: No active seeds yet — grab a torrent from the index to get going.

settings.title: Settings & controls
settings.upToDate: Identity & privacy preferences are up to date.
settings.changesReady: {n} change ready to save | {n} changes ready to save
settings.unsavedChangesPrompt: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

notifications.emptyDesc: Your administrator hasn't enabled any external channel. Once one is ready, it'll show up here for you to plug in.
notifications.routingDesc: Pick the destination for each event type. Anything you leave muted still appears in your in-app inbox.
notifications.routingEmpty: Configure at least one destination above to start routing events.
notifications.addPickerHelp: Pick a transport. You'll set up your credentials right after.

webPush.enabledHere: Active in this browser — system notifications will land here.
webPush.disabledHere: Not enabled in this browser yet.
webPush.blocked: Permission denied in browser. Re-enable it in the site settings of your browser to subscribe.
webPush.unsupported: This browser doesn't support Web Push.
webPush.error: The browser couldn't subscribe. Try again or check site permissions.
webPush.missingPublicKey: The administrator hasn't finished setting up Web Push (VAPID key missing).

notifications.removeConfirmMessage: The configuration will be deleted and any routing pointing at it will be cleared. You can reconfigure later if needed.

identity.usernameLocked: Your username is locked — it's tied to your announce URL and moderation history. Use a display name to change how you appear on profile pages without rotating your identity.
identity.displayNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to use your username
identity.bioPlaceholder: A short blurb on your seedbox, your taste, or what you're farming this month.

privacy.showLastSeen: Show last-seen on my public profile
privacy.showLastSeenHint: When off, members visiting your public profile see "Hidden" instead of a timestamp. Mods and admins always see the real value for moderation.
privacy.showAdultContentHint: Hides every torrent in the XXX category tree from listings, searches, RSS and the homepage feed. The individual torrent pages render a "content filtered" notice in place of the actual data when this is off. Default off — flip it on only if that's what you want.

security.title: Security
security.twoFactorHint: Add a second factor on top of your password. We support authenticator apps (TOTP) and platform / hardware passkeys. Configure either or both — you'll pick which one to use at sign-in.
security.trustedDevicesHint: Skip the second factor on browsers you've already verified (30 days). Disable to reset.
security.changePasswordHint: Your password never leaves this device. We re-derive a fresh salt + verifier from the new password and replace the stored pair atomically.
security.trackerPasskeyHint: Reveal, copy or rotate your passkey from the tracker credentials section on your profile.
security.signOutDeviceHint: Ends the current session cookie and sends you back to the login page.
security.otherDevicesNote: Other tabs and devices stay signed in until they log out manually.

errors.samePassword: New password must differ from the current one

torrents.title: Torrent index
torrents.objectsIndexed: {n} object indexed in database | {n} objects indexed in database

uploadForm.categoryHelp: Pick the category first — movie or TV categories unlock the metadata search.
uploadForm.dropSub: or click to browse the filesystem
uploadForm.titlePlaceholder: The release name as you want it indexed
uploadForm.parseTitleTooltip: Detect tags (resolution / source / codec / language / …) from the title
uploadForm.identityHelp: We auto-search TMDb from the parsed title. Pick a result to attach IMDb / TMDb / TVDB ids in one step.
uploadForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the release. Paste BBCode, HTML or Markdown — it all converts.
uploadForm.descriptionRequired: A description is required to publish.
uploadForm.tagsHint: Press Enter or comma to add. Existing tags auto-suggest as you type.
uploadForm.asidePlaceholderPrefix: Pick a category, then drop a
uploadForm.asidePlaceholderSuffix: . The preview fills as you go.
uploadForm.duplicateWarning: This torrent is already on the tracker:

ready.titlePatternMismatch: Title doesn't match the category pattern
ready.tmdbRequired: TMDb id required by tracker rules

toasts.noTagsDetected: No tags detected from the title.
toasts.titleParsedAllOn: Title parsed — every detected tag was already on.

errors.nfoTooLarge: NFO file is too large (max {kb} KB)

result.subtitle: The release is now indexed and ready to share.

edit.identityHelp: Search TMDb to attach the right metadata, or paste an id manually below. Picking a result fills IMDb / TMDb / TVDB in one step.
edit.nfoPlaceholder: Paste or upload an NFO release file…

errors.readNfo: Could not read the NFO file

list.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, hash, or paste an IMDb / TMDb / TVDB link…
list.noTagsYet: No tags yet — they'll appear here once a torrent is tagged.
list.noResultsHint: The search query did not match any indexed torrents.

swarm.title: Active Swarm ({n})
swarm.empty: No active peers detected in swarm

deleteConfirm.title: Delete torrent
deleteConfirm.message: Permanently remove “{name}” from the index? This cannot be undone.

adultGate.eyebrow: §6000 · Adult content · Hidden by your settings
adultGate.copy: You have adult content turned off in your settings. The page still exists, but everything on it — including the title and the full hash — is intentionally hidden until you toggle the setting back on.

search.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, hash, or paste an IMDb / TMDb / TVDB link…
search.noTags: No tags yet — they'll appear here once a torrent is tagged.
search.noResultsHint: We couldn't find any torrents matching your search criteria. Try different keywords or filters.

twoFactor.recoveryCodesLeft: {n} recovery code left | {n} recovery codes left

modals.disableTotpBlurb: Disabling TOTP also burns your recovery codes. Confirm with either a current 6-digit code or one of the recovery codes — you'll lose 2FA on this account if no passkey is registered.
modals.regenerateBlurb: Issues 8 fresh recovery codes and burns the old batch. Confirm with a current TOTP code.
modals.namePasskeyBlurb: Helps you tell your passkeys apart later — e.g. iPhone 15, YubiKey 5C, Work laptop.

errors.disable: Could not disable TOTP — try again.

twoFactorLogin.blurb: One more step. Pick the second factor that's handy:
twoFactorLogin.recoveryHint: Recovery codes are single-use. The remaining set stays valid.
twoFactorLogin.passkeyHintSuffix: below; your browser will prompt for the registered passkey (Touch ID, Windows Hello, security key…).

errors.passkeyFailed: Passkey verification failed. Try again or use another method.

totp.scanBlurb: Scan the QR with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Bitwarden, Authy…) or enter the secret manually. Then type the 6-digit code it generates to confirm.
totp.enabledPrefix: TOTP enabled. Save these recovery codes — they're shown

errors.invalidCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
errors.rejected: Code rejected. Double-check the time on your phone and try again.

recoveryCodes.warningSuffix: . Each is single-use. Keep them somewhere offline — a password manager, a printout, or both.
recoveryCodes.printIntro: Each code is single-use. Keep this paper somewhere safe.

moderation.readonly: This conversation is read-only from your viewpoint.

bannerSub.pendingStaff: Use the actions below to approve, request changes, or reject this row.
bannerSub.pendingUser: A moderator will review your upload shortly.
bannerSub.changesOwner: Read the moderator's note, edit the torrent, then save to resubmit.
bannerSub.rejected: Hidden from public listings. Only a moderator can re-open it.
bannerSub.accepted: Visible everywhere. Notes posted here stay between you and the moderation team.

emptyHint.pendingStaff: Open the composer below to action this row.
emptyHint.pendingUser: You will be notified once a moderator chimes in.
emptyHint.changesOwner: Save an edit to push the torrent back into review.
emptyHint.rejected: Only a moderator can post here now.

composer.headStaff: Take action or leave a note
composer.placeholderRejected: Explain why you are re-opening this rejected file…
composer.placeholderStaff: Add a note or write the rationale for an action…

titles.changesRequiresNote: A note explaining what to change is required

errors.noteRequired: A note is required for this action.

badge.pendingTitle: Awaiting moderation. Hidden from public listings until accepted.
badge.changesRequestedTitle: A moderator asked for changes. Edit the torrent to resubmit it.
badge.rejectedTitle: Rejected. Hidden from public listings; only a moderator can move it elsewhere.

explainer.downloadFree: Downloaded bytes are not counted at all (full freeleech).
explainer.downloadReduced: Only {pct}% of your downloaded bytes count against your ratio (instead of 100% normally).
explainer.downloadMultiplied: Downloaded bytes are multiplied by {mult}× — uncommon, your ratio drops faster than usual.
explainer.uploadReduced: Only {pct}% of your uploaded bytes count.

report.title: Report {target}
report.anonymousNote: Your identity is kept hidden from the reported party. Only moderators see who filed this report.

searchBar.placeholder: Search by name, hash, or paste an IMDb / TMDb / TVDB link…

wysiwyg.imageOnlyHttp: Only http(s) image URLs are accepted.

errors.couldNotLoadDetails: Could not load full details for that result.

descriptions.bonusEvents: Schedule Freeleech / Silverleech windows and custom multipliers
descriptions.bonusRules: Configure how users earn bonus points (seeding, milestones, daily login, …) and the tier curves
descriptions.shop: Define what users can spend their seed-bonus points on
descriptions.bannedIps: View, add and remove IPs from the auth blocklist
descriptions.uploadRules: Server-enforced gates every torrent upload must pass
descriptions.notifications: Configure external notification channels (email, Discord, Telegram, …)

retention.title: Notification retention
retention.description: How long delivered notifications live on disk before the daily sweep deletes them. Two separate TTLs so unread items can survive longer than already-read archives.

channels.title: Notification channels
channels.desc: Enable the transports your users can route notifications through. Each channel must pass a server-side test before users can pick it up.
channels.keepSecret: (unchanged — leave blank to keep current value)
channels.userOwned: No admin-side configuration needed — users paste their own webhook URL.

live.title: Live
live.desc: Enabled and validated. Users can route notifications through these right now.

action.title: Action required
action.desc: Enabled but the last server test failed or has never run. Re-test after any credential change to expose the channel to users.

available.title: Available
available.desc: Disabled or never set up. Flip the switch to bring a transport online — users won't see it until its test passes.

notifications.contextRetestNeeded: Last test failed — re-test after fixing the config.
notifications.contextUntested: Configuration changed — needs a fresh test.
notifications.contextNeverConfigured: Not configured yet. Open to set up credentials.

fields.hostHint: Hostname of your outgoing mail server.
fields.secureHint: Enable for port 465. Leave off for STARTTLS on port 587.
fields.fromHint: Header value shown to recipients (a valid email address, optionally with a display name).

telegram.label: Telegram
telegram.tagline: Push notifications to a bot you create through BotFather on Telegram.

fields.botTokenHint: Token returned by BotFather on Telegram after creating your bot.
fields.chatIdHint: Send /start to your bot then visit api.telegram.org/bot[token]/getUpdates to find it.

discord.label: Discord
discord.tagline: Post into a Discord channel through a server webhook.

fields.webhookUrlHint: Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → New Webhook.
fields.usernameHint: Optional. Leave blank to keep the webhook's default name.

slack.label: Slack
slack.tagline: Send messages through a Slack incoming webhook.

fields.webhookUrlHint: Create one in your Slack workspace under Apps → Incoming Webhooks.

mattermost.label: Mattermost
mattermost.tagline: Self-hosted Slack alternative. Same incoming-webhook contract.

ntfy.label: ntfy
ntfy.tagline: HTTP push to your phone or browser via ntfy.sh or a self-hosted instance.
ntfy.publicInstance: Subscribe in your mobile app on

fields.authHeaderHint: Optional. e.g. "Bearer …" or "Basic …" for protected servers.
fields.topicHint: Pick a long random word to keep the topic private — you'll subscribe to it in the mobile app.

gotify.label: Gotify
gotify.tagline: Self-hosted push server with mobile apps.

fields.baseUrlHint: Base URL of your Gotify instance.
fields.appTokenHint: Created in Gotify → Apps → Create Application.

pushover.label: Pushover
pushover.tagline: Paid push service with mobile, desktop and watch clients.

fields.userKeyHint: Find it on your Pushover dashboard home.

webhook.label: Generic webhook
webhook.tagline: Stable JSON payload POSTed to any HTTP(S) endpoint.

fields.hmacSecretHint: Optional. When set, requests carry X-Trackarr-Signature.
fields.urlHint: Where to POST notifications. Private/loopback hosts are blocked.
fields.headersHint: One per line in "Key: Value" format. Up to 16 entries.

apprise.label: Apprise
apprise.tagline: 100+ exotic services via an Apprise sidecar container.

fields.apiUrlHint: Base URL of your apprise-api container (e.g. http://apprise:8000).
fields.appriseUrlHint: URL string for your service, e.g. tgram://token/chatid.

web_push.label: Browser push
web_push.tagline: System-level notifications delivered to the user's browser, even when the tab is closed.

fields.subject: Contact (VAPID subject)
fields.subjectHint: mailto: or https:// URL the push service can reach you on. Required by RFC 8292.
fields.publicKeyHint: Auto-generated. Browsers use it to authenticate the push subscription.
fields.privateKeyHint: Auto-generated, kept on the server. Sign the push JWT — never share.

gates.title: Global gates
gates.intro: Six policy levers every upload runs through before it lands in the queue. Toggle the ones you want enforced; some carry a numeric or regex knob below.

nfo.title: Require an NFO
nfo.description: Reject the upload when no NFO file or pasted NFO text is provided.

description.title: Require a description
description.description: Reject the upload when the description field is empty or whitespace only.
description.minLengthHint: 0 = no minimum. Counted after trimming whitespace.

titleBlocklist.title: Title blocklist
titleBlocklist.description: A global regex applied to every title. Useful for banning source qualities you don't accept (CAM, TS, HDCAM, …) without repeating them in every per-category pattern.
titleBlocklist.hint: Leave empty to disable. The pattern is wrapped with ^…$ automatically and matched case-insensitively.

tmdb.title: Require a TMDb id
tmdb.description: Reject the upload when no TMDb id is filled in. Useful for trackers that want metadata coverage on every entry.

maxSize.title: Maximum torrent size
maxSize.description: Catastrophe cap. Block accidental multi-terabyte uploads before they hit the moderation queue.
maxSize.hint: Computed from the parsed .torrent (single file or sum of files). Leave empty to disable.

staffBypass.title: Staff bypass
staffBypass.description: When on, admins and moderators are exempt from every rule above. Independent of the canUploadWithoutModeration role permission, which only controls whether the upload lands in the moderation queue.

titlePattern.title: Title pattern per category
titlePattern.intro: Per-category title regex with parent → child inheritance. Set a regex once on a root category and every descendant picks it up; override on any child to deviate from the default.
titlePattern.enabledTitle: Enforce a title pattern per category
titlePattern.enabledDescription: A regex set on a parent category cascades down to every descendant. A child can override with its own regex; leaving a child's field empty means it inherits.
titlePattern.explain: Regex are wrapped with ^…$ automatically and matched case-insensitively. Leave a field empty to remove its own restriction (the category will then inherit from the nearest parent that has one). An invalid regex is highlighted in red and blocks save.
titlePattern.toggleHint: Enable the toggle above to expose the per-category pattern table.
titlePattern.noCategories: No categories defined yet. Add some from the Categories admin page first.

uploadRules.fixErrorsFirst: Fix the highlighted regex before saving

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.intro: Live snapshot of the tracker's vital signs — torrents, peers, protocols, and announce endpoints — at a glance.
dashboard.noHistoryHint: Stats collection has just started. Check back in an hour.

invites.title: Invitations
invites.intro: Members generate their own codes from {link} — your job here is to {action}. Admins follow the same rule and use their own page to invite people.

grant.title: Grant slots
grant.intro: Top up a specific user's invitation quota. They'll generate the codes themselves from /invites.

ledger.title: Registry
ledger.intro: Every invitation ever emitted, oldest first. Filter by state or strike a code that should no longer be valid.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Filter by code, creator or recipient…

table.codeTitle: Code (masked) — only the member who created it can see it in full.
table.strikeUsedTitle: Strike from registry (recipient keeps their account)

invites.noMatch: No invitations match the current filters.

confirm.title: Strike this invitation?
confirm.intro: This will permanently delete the invitation {code} from the registry.
confirm.alreadyRedeemed: The code has already been redeemed — the recipient's account is not affected. This is registry housekeeping only.
confirm.willRefund: The slot will be returned to {at}{username}.
confirm.alreadyClosed: The window has already closed — no slot will be returned.

toasts.granted: Granted {count} invitation to {at}{username}. | Granted {count} invitations to {at}{username}.
toasts.struckRefunded: Struck from registry. Slot returned to creator.

categories.title: Categories
categories.intro: Each category is an entry in the atlas — name, slug, Newznab call number, and optional media type. Roots group their subcategories below a gold thread; adult rows carry the warning hatch.
categories.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, slug or Newznab id…

empty.title: Atlas is empty
empty.hint: Seed the recommended Torznab-compatible category set, or add a category from scratch.

fields.name: Name
fields.parentReassignHint: Parent reassignment isn't supported yet — delete and recreate if you need to move a row.
fields.newznabIdHint: Torznab category id used by *Arr clients. Standard ids live in 1000–8999; the Prowlarr/Jackett custom range (100000–199999) is also accepted for tracker-specific categories. Leave empty to fall back to a stable synthetic id derived from the category slug.
fields.newznabIdHintShort: Standard range 1000–8999 · custom 100000–199999. Empty falls back to a synthetic id.
fields.mediaTypeHint: Drives the TMDb namespace hint. Auto falls back to the slug + Newznab heuristic.
fields.mediaTypeHintShort: TMDb namespace. Auto = slug + Newznab heuristic.

adult.title: Mark as adult content
adult.subPart1: Hidden from users who haven't enabled XXX in their profile settings — applies to listings, search, RSS, Torznab and the homepage feed.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete category
deleteConfirm.messageNamed: Permanently delete the category “{name}”? Torrents currently in it will become uncategorised.
deleteConfirm.messageGeneric: Permanently delete this category? Torrents currently in it will become uncategorised.

seedConfirm.title: Seed default categories
seedConfirm.message: Create the recommended Torznab-compatible category set on top of what already exists?

rules.title: Earning rules
rules.intro: Five mechanisms credit users with bonus points. Each rule has its own knob; the seeding rule additionally multiplies its base rate by the seed-count + age tier curves below.

seedTiers.title: Seed-count tier curve
seedTiers.intro: Fewer concurrent seeders ⇒ higher multiplier. Tiers are evaluated in ascending max-seeders order; the first row whose max-seeders is ≥ the current count wins. A row with a very large max-seeders acts as the catch-all tail.
seedTiers.empty: No seed-count tiers configured — every seeding credit falls back to 1× until you add one.
seedTiers.curveHidden: 1 catch-all tier (≥1M seeders) hidden from the chart for readability. | {n} catch-all tiers (≥1M seeders) hidden from the chart for readability.

ageTiers.title: Age tier curve
ageTiers.intro: Older torrents reward seeding more, to keep the archive alive. Tiers are evaluated in descending min-age order; the first row whose min-age ≤ the torrent's age wins.
ageTiers.empty: No age tiers configured — every torrent falls back to 1× until you add one.

seeding.name: Seeding
seeding.description: Credits each active seeder of every torrent on every cron tick. The base rate is multiplied by the seed-count and age tier curves so rare archive seeds reward more than mainstream ones.
seeding.hint: Base rate: {value} points / hour / seed, before the tier curve multipliers below.

first_seeder.name: First seeder
first_seeder.description: One-time reward when a user is observed as the unique seeder of a torrent. Idempotent per (user × torrent) — the audit ledger refuses double-pays.
first_seeder.hint: Awarded once per (user, torrent) — never double-paid even on tracker restart.

seeding_milestone.name: Seeding milestones
seeding_milestone.description: Per-torrent cumulative seed-time thresholds. Each crossing emits a single grant — useful to reward long-haul seeders without changing the base rate.
seeding_milestone.empty: No milestones yet — add one to start rewarding long-haul seeders.

daily_login.name: Daily login
daily_login.description: Once per UTC day on the user's first authenticated request. Gated by Redis SETNX so a user hammering /api/auth/status doesn't multi-claim.
daily_login.hint: Credited at most once per UTC day per user.

account_age_monthly.name: Account age (monthly loyalty)
account_age_monthly.description: Monthly bonus for staying around. The cron credits at most every 30 days per user, gated by the grants ledger.
account_age_monthly.hint: Credited every 30 days per user — loyalty pays.

shop.title: Bonus shop
shop.intro: Define what users can spend their seed-bonus points on. Items are applied to the user's account atomically at purchase time — disable a row to take it out of the catalogue without losing its history.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Shown on the user-facing card under the name.

types.uploadCreditSub: Adds bytes to the buyer's uploaded total — pure ratio relief, no per-torrent freeleech.
types.inviteSub: Bumps the buyer's invites_remaining counter so they can draft new codes.

errors.inviteInvalid: Invitation count must be greater than 0

confirm.deleteMessage: Permanently delete "{name}"? Items with purchase history can't be deleted — disable them instead.

bonusEvents.title: Bonus Events
bonusEvents.intro: Time-bounded windows during which upload / download byte deltas are scaled before being persisted. Two presets cover the classics — {freeleech} (download×0) and {silverleech} (download×0.5) — but any combination in [0×, 2×] download / [0×, 10×] upload works. At most one window can be active at a time.
bonusEvents.empty: No bonus events scheduled yet. Click {action} to broadcast one.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Global Silverleech until the points system goes live.
form.explainerPlaceholder: A silverleech is a special window during which…
form.explainerHint: Shown in the user-facing popup under "What is this?". Leave blank to auto-generate from the multipliers.
form.enabledHint: Disable to schedule the window without activating it.

deleteModal.title: Delete bonus event
deleteModal.message: Permanently delete {title}? This cannot be undone.

intro.trail: ones we keep on file. Open a torrent to read its conversation thread and act on it — every status change is tied to a moderator note.

empty.headline: All clear.
empty.help: Nothing matches this filter. Take a coffee.

empty.noMatch: No banned IPs match that search
empty.noMatchHint: Try a less specific term, or clear the search.
empty.cleanHint: Bans appear here as you add them or as users get banned with a known IP.

confirm.title: Remove from blocklist
confirm.messageAuto: {ip} was banned alongside a user account. Removing it here lets the IP register / log in again, but the user remains banned. Proceed?
confirm.messageManual: Allow {ip} to register and authenticate again?

table.ipHashTooltip: Stable hash of the user's last IP. Equal hashes mean equal IPs — useful for spotting multi-account abuse without seeing the raw address.
table.noStaffNoRole: No staff flag, no role attached

empty.title: No users match those filters
empty.subBefore: Try widening the date range or

bonusModal.title: Bonus points · {username}
bonusModal.noteHint: logged on the audit row · optional
bonusModal.notePlaceholder: e.g. Compensation for the Mar 12 announce outage.

errors.generic: Could not adjust the balance. Try again.

rolesModal.summary: {attached} of {total} role attached | {attached} of {total} roles attached
rolesModal.emptyBefore: No roles defined yet. Create one in

confirm.banMessage: Ban {username}? Their last known IP will be added to the IP blacklist and active sessions will be invalidated.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subBefore: Manual roles attach by hand from the user registry. Auto roles attach themselves whenever a user matches their rule set —
roles.subAfter: after fifteen approved uploads is the canonical example.
roles.recomputeTooltip: Re-run the engine for every user

empty.title: No roles yet
empty.subAfter: to define your first permission tier or auto-attached badge.

card.manualNote: Attached only by an admin from the user registry.

modal.name: Name
modal.priorityHint: Higher wins between matching auto roles.
modal.iconHint: Phosphor icon name. Leave empty for a coloured dot.
modal.modeManualSub: Admin attaches it from the user registry. The auto engine never touches manual roles.
modal.modeAutoSub: Granted whenever a user matches the rules below. Highest-priority match wins.
modal.showAsBadgeSub: Users with this role get a coloured chip on their profile alongside any Admin/Mod indicator.
modal.skipModerationSub: Uploads from members with this role go straight to the index without passing through the pending queue.
modal.noConditions: No conditions yet — add one to enable matching.

confirm.deleteMessage: Permanently remove the role "{name}"? Users currently assigned to it will lose its permissions.

toasts.recomputeResult: Engine swept {considered} user(s) — {changed} updated, {skipped} manual override(s)

reports.title: Reports
reports.intro: Each user report lands here as a numbered case file. Skim the target, the reason, and the reporter — then accept (which cascades a torrent rejection) or dismiss.
reports.cascadeHint: Accepting will reject the torrent and notify the uploader.
reports.emptyHintPending: No pending reports — the queue is empty.
reports.emptyHintResolved: No reports have been resolved yet.
reports.emptyHintDismissed: No reports have been dismissed yet.
reports.emptyHintAll: No reports have been filed yet.

tags.title: Tags
tags.intro: Tags are short, coloured labels uploaders can attach to a torrent. Pick a hue per tag — they'll show up in search filters, on listing rows, and on the torrent detail page.
tags.emptyHint: Forge your first tag above. The new swatch will land here.
tags.name: Name

forge.title: Forge a tag
forge.intro: Type a name, pick a colour. The slug is derived automatically; tweak it if you want a different URL handle.

palette.title: The palette
palette.intro: Every tag currently in circulation. Hover a chip to reveal its strike action.

tags.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, slug or hex…
tags.deleteConfirmNamed: Remove the “{name}” tag? Torrents currently tagged with it keep their other tags.

branding.intro: Shape the look and feel of the entire site — logo, copy, and the homepage. Everything updates live in the preview above.

identity.title: Identity
identity.intro: Site name, logo, and favicon — the marks visitors see first.

copy.title: Copy
copy.intro: Text that appears across the site: login screen, footer, rules.

homepage.title: Homepage
homepage.intro: Hero block and feature cards on the landing page.

branding.unsavedChanges: no changes | 1 unsaved change | {n} unsaved changes
branding.siteNameDescription: Displayed in the navbar and browser title. Use rich text for custom styling.
branding.subtitle: Subtitle
branding.subtitleDescription: Text below site name. Leave empty to show version. Supports rich text.
branding.logoTypeDescription: Choose between a Phosphor icon or a custom image.
branding.logoImageDescription: Upload a custom logo (PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP). Max 5MB.
branding.dropOrClick: Drop image or click to upload
branding.faviconDescription: Upload a custom favicon (ICO, PNG, SVG). Max 1MB. Shown in browser tabs.
branding.dropFavicon: Drop favicon or click to upload
branding.textBrandingHint: Customize text that appears throughout the site. Use the rich text editor for advanced formatting.
branding.authTitleDescription: Title shown on login/register pages. Leave empty to use Site Name.
branding.authSubtitleDescription: Subtitle shown below the title on login/register pages.
branding.footerContentDescription: Custom footer content. Supports rich text formatting.
branding.pageTitleSuffixDescription: Text appended to browser tab titles. Plain text only.
branding.welcomeMessageDescription: Rich text message displayed on the homepage or dashboard.
branding.siteRulesDescription: Rules and terms displayed to users. Supports full rich text.

homepage.title: Homepage Content
homepage.heroTitleDescription: The main headline on the homepage. Use rich text for custom styling, colors, and fonts.
homepage.heroSubtitleDescription: A short description below the title. Supports rich text.
homepage.statusBadgeDescription: Text shown in the pill badge above the title.
homepage.featureLabelDescription: Title and description for this feature card. Supports rich text.

panic.title: Emergency Lockdown
panic.intro: Encrypt all sensitive data immediately. This action renders data unreadable without the panic password set during first registration.
panic.encryptedHint: All sensitive data is currently encrypted. Enter the panic password to restore access.
panic.confirmHint: This will encrypt all sensitive data in the database. The data will be unreadable until restored with the panic password.
panic.irreversibleWarning: {warn} This action is irreversible without the panic password.
panic.restoreHint: Enter the panic password that was set during the first admin registration to decrypt and restore all data.

registration.title: Registration
registration.modeDescription: How members can join the tracker.
registration.modeClosedDescription: No new accounts. Existing members can still sign in and operate normally.
registration.modeInviteOnlyDescription: Only people with a valid invitation code from a member can register.
registration.modeOpenDescription: Anyone can sign up freely. Invitation codes are not required.
registration.defaultInvitesDescription: Number of invitation codes each new user receives upon registration.
registration.minRatioDescription: Users with a ratio below this value will be blocked from downloading. Set to 0 to disable.
registration.starterCreditDescription: Initial upload amount given to new users to prevent immediate ratio blocking.

announcements.title: Site Announcement
announcements.enableDescription: Display a banner below the main navigation bar on all pages.
announcements.messageDescription: The content of the announcement. Keep it short and clear.
announcements.bannerTypeDescription: Determines the color and icon of the announcement banner.

system.repoFallbackHint: Default — no TRACKARR_REPO env var set

config.title: API Configuration
config.apiStatusDescription: Enable or disable the Torznab API for all users. When disabled, *arr apps won't be able to connect.
config.loggingDescription: Log all API requests for debugging and monitoring. Logs are stored for 7 days.
config.endpointDescription: The base URL for the Torznab API. Users add this in Prowlarr/Sonarr/Radarr.

users.title: API Users
users.resetPasskeyMessage: Are you sure you want to reset the passkey for {username}? They will need to update their *arr apps with the new passkey.
users.blockUserMessage: Are you sure you want to block {username} from using the Torznab API? They won't be able to search or download via *arr apps.

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.intro: Configure rate limits to prevent API abuse. These limits apply per user (passkey) within the specified time window.
rateLimiting.windowDescription: The duration (in seconds) for rate limit calculations.
rateLimiting.searchLimitDescription: Maximum search requests (search, tvsearch, movie) per window per user.
rateLimiting.downloadLimitDescription: Maximum torrent file download requests per window per user.
rateLimiting.infoNote: Changes take effect immediately for new requests.

descriptions.pendingTorrents: Review and approve pending torrent uploads

dashboard.tagline: Survey the queue, scan the activity log, and step into whatever needs you next.

pendingReports.title: Pending Reports
pendingReports.body: Check the reports section to handle user complaints.

recentHnR.title: Recent H&R
recentHnR.body: Monitor users who are not seeding back.

categoryForm.descriptionPlaceholder: A short tagline shown beneath the section title.

topic.replyPlaceholder: Write your reply… you can quote previous posts via the quote icon.
topic.lockedNotice: This thread is locked. The conversation has wrapped — start a new one if you want to keep talking.
topic.notFound: That thread doesn't exist or has been retired.

deleteTopicConfirm.title: Delete topic
deleteTopicConfirm.message: Permanently delete "{title}" and all its replies?

deletePostConfirm.title: Delete post
deletePostConfirm.message: Permanently remove this post from the thread?

masthead.title: The Forum
masthead.tagline: A community broadsheet — sections, threads, and dispatches from the tracker.

empty.tile: No dispatch yet — be the first to file.
empty.title: No sections yet
empty.subAdmin: Open the first section to give the forum a shape — members will file threads inside it.
empty.subMember: An administrator hasn't opened any section yet. Check back soon.

modals.deleteWarning: ? Every thread filed under it will be removed too. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: A blank page awaits.
empty.sub: No threads in this section yet — be the first to file one.

category.notFound: That section doesn't exist or has been retired.

newTopic.title: Open a new thread
newTopic.blurb: State your case, drop your dispatch, raise your question — the floor is yours.

fields.headline: Headline
fields.bodyPlaceholder: Write the seed post. Markdown formatting is supported.

preview.empty: The body of your post will render here, formatting included.

shop.blurb: Spend the points you earned by seeding on a small, hand-picked selection of perks — upload credit, invitation slots, and whatever else the operator has put on the shelves. Each piece is granted to your account the moment you acquire it.
shop.editionOf: 1 left in this edition | {n} left in this edition

empty.headline: The cabinet is bare for now.
empty.help: An administrator hasn't placed any pieces on the shelves yet. Come back later — your points will keep their value in the meantime.

effects.invite: Adds {n} invitation slot | Adds {n} invitation slots

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.blurb: Every torrent you've started leeching, sorted by date. When the tracker has captured your share for a release the per-torrent uploaded / downloaded totals show up next to it.

empty.title: No downloads yet
empty.body: Once you start a download, the tracker stamps an entry here. Come back after grabbing your first torrent — it'll show up at the top of the list, freshest first.

registry.prose: An invitation is a quiet trust. Each code you draft below offers the door to a single guest of your choosing — once passed through, it is theirs alone.
registry.remainingFull: invitations to extend — the registry is full

draft.title: Draft a new invitation
draft.sub: Pick how long the code remains valid. After that window closes, the door reverts.
draft.emptyNote: Your registry has reached its allotted count. An administrator may extend it.

ledger.title: The ledger
ledger.sub: Every code you have ever drafted, in chronological order.
ledger.emptyHelp: Cast your first invitation above to begin the ledger.

modal.title: Your invitation has been cast
modal.instructionHtml: The code below appears once. Copy it now — once you close this dialog, it returns to silence.
modal.warning: If you misplace it, delete the row from the ledger to refund the slot, then cast again.

confirm.title: Strike from the ledger?
confirm.textHtml: This row will be permanently struck from your registry.
confirm.refundedNote: The slot will return to your remaining count.
confirm.expiredNoteHtml: Its window has already closed — the slot will not return.

toasts.struckRefunded: Struck from the ledger. Slot returned.

errors.copyManual: Could not copy. Select and copy manually.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: Anything worth telling you — a moderation outcome, a comment on your release, a bonus event going live — lands here.

hnr_violation_marked.title: Hit & Run flagged
hnr_violation_marked.desc: “{torrentName}” crossed the grace period without enough seeding.

account_unbanned.title: Account restored
account_unbanned.desc: {actorUsername} lifted the suspension on your account.

role_detached.title: Role removed
role_detached.desc: {actorUsername} removed the “{roleName}” role from your account.

password_changed.title: Password changed
password_changed.desc: Your password was changed. If this wasn't you, rotate it now.

totp_enabled.title: TOTP enabled
totp_enabled.desc: Two-factor authenticator app is now active.

totp_disabled.title: TOTP disabled
totp_disabled.desc: Two-factor authenticator app was turned off.

passkey_added.title: Passkey added
passkey_added.desc: New passkey “{passkeyName}” registered on your account.

passkey_removed.title: Passkey removed
passkey_removed.desc: A passkey was removed from your account.

recovery_codes_regenerated.title: Recovery codes regenerated
recovery_codes_regenerated.desc: A new batch of recovery codes was minted. Store them safely.

recovery_code_used.title: Recovery code used
recovery_code_used.desc: A recovery code was consumed to sign in. Investigate if it wasn't you.

bonus_event_started.title: Bonus event started
bonus_event_started.desc: “{title}” is live — go grab the multipliers.

first_seeder_reward.title: First seeder reward
first_seeder_reward.desc: You earned {amount} points as the first seeder.

seeding_milestone_reached.title: Seeding milestone reached
seeding_milestone_reached.desc: Another {amount} bonus points credited from a seeding milestone.

trusted_device_added.title: Trusted device added
trusted_device_added.desc: A new device was marked as trusted on your account.
